title: Sum of all rating columns
excerpt: Is it possible to add several ratings columns to get one final score?

posts.author: Ctorres (Carmela)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to add several ratings columns to get one final score?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Ctorres

Welcome to the community. You can add a formula column to add up any number of rating columns. The formula column will display a number (sum of all ratings). It is good to understand that the formula columns displays the sum but that number can’t be used in any automation.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
